series_metadata.series_description: This is a listing, showing state of audits of spirituous liquor agencies, over and short accounts concerning banking, audits and 15 day discrepancies.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Maintain hard copy in the operating area until entered into the database and then destroy. ; Electronic: Maintain machine-readable records on the computer databse until superseded or until record series is no longer created and then destroy by erasure., Paper: Recycle ; Electronic: Erase
